project_type: React SPA dashboard for DMS (Driver Monitoring System) cockpit
build_system: Vite 5 with pnpm (no node_modules currently installed, network blocked)
build_command: Cannot run build (no node_modules, network blocked). Use Node.js AST parsing for syntax validation.
test_command: Cannot run tests (no node_modules, network blocked). Validate TypeScript syntax only.
verification_instructions: Since npm install is impossible under INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network, validate by: 1) Ensure TSX files parse correctly as valid TypeScript/JSX using node --check or swc parse. 2) Verify no missing imports. 3) Verify type usage matches src/types/dms.ts interfaces.
setup_instructions: npm install (blocked by network). Dependencies: react 18, recharts 2.13, lucide-react 0.460, tailwindcss 3.4, vite 5.4
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode. Cannot install packages, pull images, or access external URLs. Must validate using syntax/AST only. No Docker available.
contribution_requirements: Do NOT modify: services/, hooks/, types/, Dashboard.tsx layout structure. Only modify cockpit visual components.
key_patterns: Components use FC<Props> pattern with typed interfaces. Tailwind utility classes with custom dms-* colors (dms-dark, dms-panel, dms-accent, dms-warning, dms-danger, dms-success). SVG inline for graphics. Recharts for timeline charts. Lucide-react for icons. All components receive DMSTelemetry data prop.
directory_structure: src/components/cockpit/ contains all visual panel components. src/types/dms.ts has all telemetry types. src/services/ has telemetry data providers (DO NOT MODIFY). src/hooks/ has useTelemetry hook (DO NOT MODIFY).
